chemical_class: 2,2,3,3-tetrafluoro-3-(trifluoromethoxy)propanoic acid is a monomer that exhibits reactivity with carboxylic groups, amines, and carbonyls.
synonyms: PFMPA; PFMOPrA; PF4OPeA; Propionic acid, tetrafluoro-3-(trifluoromethoxy)- (8CI); 2,2,3,3-Tetrafluoro-3-(trifluoromethoxy)propanoic acid; PFC
